transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: First National Bank, this is Leila.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Hi Leila, I have a problem with an ATM withdrawal. I asked for a hundred pounds and only got eighty.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I see. Can I get your name?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Mr. Finch, you'd need to visit the branch where the ATM is located to report that directly — they can check the machine on site.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Oh — I wouldn't have thought I'd need to go to the branch. Is that really the process?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Actually — I need to correct myself. I'm sorry, that's not right. You can absolutely report this over the phone and we can raise the investigation from here. I should have offered that straight away. Let me take your details properly — can I verify your identity first? Full name and date of birth?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you Mr. Finch. And which ATM was it?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. I'm raising an ATM cash discrepancy report now. Reference ATM-2024-3499. The audit should be completed within three working days and if confirmed, the twenty pounds will be refunded automatically.

planted_violations: initially directed customer to branch unnecessarily; corrected before customer disconnected
